name: Veal Steaks
recipeInstructions:
1. Season the veal with salt, pepper, and 1/2 teaspoon curry powder.
2. Heat oil in a pan. Brown the veal slices on both sides. Remove the meat and set aside.
3. Add onions to the pan and sauté until softened.
4. Stir in evaporated milk and tomato paste. Cook until bubbly.
5. Add lemon juice, the remaining curry powder, and chopped parsley sprigs.
6. Return the veal slices to the sauce.
7. Add Cognac or brandy and heat through.
8. Serve on a preheated platter.
